description_long: This object is a classic American-style hot dog, featuring a plump sausage nestled inside a soft, lightly browned bun. The sausage is topped with a generous application of yellow mustard and green relish, with finely chopped onions scattered along the length. The bun appears fluffy and slightly textured, cradling the sausage and condiments securely. The hot dog is presented without any visible packaging or tray, and the sausage is partially visible above the bun, with condiments applied in a visually appealing manner. There are no visible grill marks on the sausage or bun, and the overall appearance suggests a freshly prepared street food item.
description: A classic hot dog in a soft bun, topped with mustard, relish, and onions, with the sausage partially visible and no packaging.
description_view_0: The hot dog is seen from a slight angle, showing the bun, sausage, and a clear view of the condiments on top.
description_view_1: The hot dog is viewed from the side, revealing the length of the bun and sausage, with condiments visible along the top.
description_view_2: The hot dog is partially obscured by other objects, but the bun and a hint of the sausage and condiments are visible from the front.
description_view_3: The hot dog is seen from the opposite side, displaying the bun and sausage with condiments, similar to view 1 but from a mirrored perspective.
